title: Adding & subtracting rational numbers
description: Practice adding and subtracting negative fractions, decimals, and percents.

assessment_items.question_content:
$ 0.25 - 1.125 - \dfrac{16}{8} = $ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]

*Enter the answer as an exact decimal or simplified fraction.*
hints: First get all of the numbers in decimal form.
